clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation within the amygdala, anterior insula, and anterior cingulate, representing the macroscopic processing of valenced internal states, physiological arousal, and emotional reactivity.
This cluster maps centrally onto ventromedial prefrontal and striatal circuitries, unified by the functional computation of incentive, reward processing, and value-based decision making.

These terms co-activate across cortical midline structures and the temporoparietal junction, capturing internally-directed processes that support representations of the self and the mental states of others.
